title: E-Commerce UI
description: A modern e-commerce front-end built with React and Tailwind.
longDescription: A fully responsive e-commerce storefront featuring product listing, cart management, and checkout flow. Built with React 18, Tailwind CSS, and Zustand for state management.

title: Task Manager App
description: Full-stack task manager with auth, REST API and React UI.
longDescription: A full-stack task management application with user authentication, real-time updates, and a clean dashboard. Backend powered by Node.js/Express with a PostgreSQL database.
